hero.subtitle: Choose from hundreds of available cars all over Egypt at competitive prices and exceptional service.

howItWorks.title: How Rento Works?
howItWorks.searchDesc: Choose from categories of cars in your city easily with one click.
howItWorks.bookDesc: Enter your details, choose the appropriate time, and secure your booking with full safety.
howItWorks.driveDesc: Pick up keys from the dealer's location or request delivery to you and start your journey.

featured.subtitleRent: Latest models available for booking now
featured.subtitleBuy: Explore premium vehicles available for purchase

whyUs.title: Why Thousands Choose Rento?
whyUs.subtitle: We don't just offer car rentals; we provide a reliable and enjoyable driving experience, taking care of every detail to guarantee your comfort and safety on every trip.
whyUs.check1: More than 50 pickup points across the country
whyUs.check2: A diverse fleet to suit all budgets
whyUs.check3: Home delivery or airport pickup option
whyUs.safeDesc: Comprehensive insurance coverage on all accidents and damages for all cars.
whyUs.easyDesc: Book your perfect car in less than two minutes via app or website.
whyUs.priceDesc: Complete transparency in pricing without any hidden fees or charges.
whyUs.supportDesc: Our customer service team is ready to assist you at any time.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our services
faq.q1: What documents are required for rental?
faq.a1: You need a valid driver's license, national ID (or passport for tourists), and a security deposit (which is fully refundable).
faq.q2: Is airport car delivery service available?
faq.a2: Yes, we offer airport delivery services at Cairo, Alexandria, and other airports. Simply select your terminal during booking.
faq.q3: How is the security deposit refunded?
faq.a3: The deposit is refunded to your card or cash depending on your initial payment method within 3-5 business days after returning the car safely.

footer.desc: Egypt's leading car rental & sales platform. Find the best cars at the prices across all of Egypt.
footer.downloadText: Download the app now for a 10% discount on your first booking
